steps.title: Spot the repeated structure
steps.content: The first sentence establishes that humans inherit physical traits from their parents. The second sentence presents the identical claim about dogs — they too inherit physical traits from their parents. The structure repeats with different subjects, signaling a comparison or analogy.

steps.title: Choose the comparison transition
steps.content:
”Similarly,” means “in the same way,” and correctly introduces the second example as parallel to the first. “In other words,” would restate a single idea (not applicable when subjects differ), “As a result,” would indicate causation (no causal relationship exists), and “In conclusion,” would mark a summary (this is an illustrative example, not a conclusion).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
